scripts.build: bun run build -w packages/core && bun run build -w packages/renderer
scripts.docs:build: npm run docs:gen && cd docs && bunx vitepress build
scripts.docs:gen: npx typedoc --options typedoc.json --tsconfig tsconfig.typedoc.json --skipErrorChecking packages/core/src/index.ts packages/renderer/src/index.ts --out docs/api/references
